channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Emma Willis, Josh Widdicombe and Johannes Radebe announced as new Strictly Come Dancing hosts
item.description: The BBC has revealed that Emma Willis, Josh Widdicombe, and professional dancer Johannes Radebe will be the new permanent hosts of Strictly Come Dancing, replacing Tess Daly and Claudia Winkleman who ...

item.title: Exploring Australia’s Potential for Next-Generation Geothermal Energy
item.description: Australia has vast potential to tap into next-generation geothermal energy by accessing superhot rocks deep underground. Unlike traditional geothermal systems limited to volcanic areas, new drilling t...

item.title: Top 8 Smart Home Devices to Enhance Your Daily Life
item.description: Smart homes are increasingly becoming a practical choice for Canadians looking to simplify daily routines and save time. This article highlights eight smart devices across various aspects of home life...

item.title: KP CM Afridi and Family Denied Meeting with Imprisoned Imran Khan at Adiala Jail
item.description: On Tuesday, the Capital Police prevented Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Chief Minister Sohail Afridi from visiting Adiala Jail in Rawalpindi to meet PTI founder Imran Khan, who has been serving a 14-year sentence...

item.title: Oparaodu Charges Rivers United Players Ahead of Final NPFL Match
item.description: Emmanuel Oparaodu, former financial secretary of Rivers United FC supporters club, don call on the players make dem go all out for their last Nigeria Professional Football League (NPFL) game against K...

item.title: Analyzing Donald Trump's Use of Props in Political Communication
item.description: Donald Trump is known for incorporating props into his speeches and public appearances, a tactic that leverages visual and emotional engagement to amplify his messages. Props can range from posters sh...

item.title: Koeman confident Netherlands squad can challenge anyone at World Cup
item.description: Netherlands manager Ronald Koeman has expressed strong confidence in his squad ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, asserting that his team has the talent to challenge any opponent. Despite not being wid...

item.title: PM Modi in Norway: Journalist's Questions, MEA Response, and Press Freedom Discussion
item.description: During Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to Norway as part of his five-nation tour, a brief but notable incident involving a Norwegian journalist escalated into a wider debate on press freedom. At ...

item.title: PAGASA alerts public on possible heavy rains and drought due to Super El Niño and Habagat
item.description: PAGASA has issued a warning that the southwest monsoon, locally known as Habagat, may coincide with a very strong or 'Super' El Niño between June and August 2026. Climate experts, led by Ana Liza Soli...

item.title: BARMM Education Ministry Faces Questions Over P2.2 Billion Fund Disbursement
item.description: The Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) is currently facing scrutiny over the disbursement of P2.2 billion in its education ministry funds. The Commission on Audit (COA) found irre...

item.title: Cotabato Leaders and WestMinCom Collaborate to Strengthen Peace and Community Development
item.description: Cotabato provincial officials, local business groups, and leaders of a former Moro rebel front reaffirmed their commitment to advancing peacebuilding initiatives in the province. The meeting on May 16...

item.title: Public Resistance to AI and Data Centers Grows Rapidly, Affecting Politics and Industry
item.description: Public opposition to artificial intelligence and the data centers that support it is increasing at an unprecedented pace, creating challenges for tech companies and influencing political dynamics nati...

item.title: Matatu Operators Agree to One-Week Suspension to Continue Diesel Price Talks
item.description: Kenya’s matatu operators have agreed to suspend their nationwide strike for one week to allow fresh negotiations with the government over rising diesel prices. The decision came after tense disagreeme...

item.title: Nzimande Supports Ramaphosa’s Legal Challenge of Phala Phala Panel Report
item.description: Senior Cabinet Minister Blade Nzimande has publicly defended President Cyril Ramaphosa's decision to legally challenge the Section 89 panel report on the Phala Phala scandal, affirming that the presid...

item.title: Court sentences main suspect to death in teenage TikTok star Sana Yousaf’s murder
item.description: In Islamabad, a court has delivered the death sentence to Umar Hayat, the principal suspect in the murder of 17-year-old TikTok influencer Sana Yousaf. The verdict was announced by Judge Muhammad Afza...

item.title: Tinio rejects Paolo Duterte’s claims on P5-M cash and P15-M for later release funds
item.description: Former lawmaker Tinio has officially denied accusations made by Paolo Duterte concerning alleged mishandling of public funds. According to Duterte, Tinio was supposedly linked to P5 million in cash an...

item.title: Couple Injured in Berhampur Road Attack; Police Identify Suspects
item.description: In Berhampur city of Odisha, a distressing incident occurred on Monday night where a man and a woman were attacked while riding a motorcycle. According to police reports, a group of people intercepted...

item.title: Senator Requests DOJ Investigation into FBI Director Kash Patel Over Misconduct Allegations
item.description: Senator Richard Blumenthal (D-CT) formally requested that the Justice Department's internal watchdog investigate FBI Director Kash Patel, following multiple reports alleging misconduct. The investigat...

item.title: San Diego police had identified teen suspects before deadly mosque shooting
item.description: San Diego authorities were actively investigating and searching for teenage suspects linked to a tragic shooting at the city’s largest Islamic centre before the incident occurred. The attack resulted ...

item.title: Right-Wing Influencer Endorses Thomas Massie, Sparking Division in MAGA Movement
item.description: Far-right influencer Sneako has ignited a new wave of tension within the MAGA movement after publicly endorsing Representative Thomas Massie, a Kentucky Republican challenging Donald Trump's preferred...
